tagline: Trendy, artistic, custom color and shear work in downtown Santa Rosa.
seoDescription: Twyla & Co. is a hair salon in downtown Santa Rosa offering master color, custom cuts, styling and lash services.
heroHeading: Master Color And Custom Hair, Downtown
heroSubheading: A team of skilled, creative stylists in downtown Santa Rosa delivering friendly, personalized color and shear work using Milbon, Olaplex and Kevin Murphy.
highlights: Master colorists specializing in custom color and corrective work
Friendly, personalized service from a small, experienced team
Premium product lines: Milbon, Olaplex and Kevin Murphy
aboutBody: Twyla & Co. is a hair salon in downtown Santa Rosa at 529 5th Street. Founder Twyla Lawrence and her team provide friendly, personalized service through a group of highly skilled and creative professionals, with a focus on trendy, artistic, custom color and shear work.

The salon team includes master colorists and stylists Rod Schmittou and Holly Millon-Maskell, a fine-hair expert, along with lash artist Alexis Samuels. They work with premium product lines including Milbon, Olaplex and Kevin Murphy, and offer free consultations.

services.title: Master Hair Color
services.description: Custom and corrective color work from experienced master colorists.

services.title: Haircuts
services.description: Precision cuts tailored to each client's hair and style.

services.title: Hair Styling
services.description: Creative styling and finishing for any occasion.

services.title: Fine Hair Services
services.description: Specialized color and care for fine hair from an in-house expert.

services.title: Lash Services
services.description: Lash work from the salon's dedicated lash artist.

services.title: Free Consultations
services.description: Complimentary consultations to plan your color or cut.

testimonials.quote: Twyla is wonderful. She is professional and amazing. Her salon is darling.
testimonials.author: Deana F.

testimonials.quote: Twyla knows my hair, communicates well & takes great feedback in terms of what I want.
testimonials.author: Candice H.

testimonials.quote: I always love my hair after I visit Twyla! My blonde she fixed for me is my favorite color.
testimonials.author: Sofia M.

notes: Address: 529 5th Street, Santa Rosa, CA 95401. Phone 707.481.7012. Site (Wix) lists no published hours and no founding year; secondary sources mention '25+ years in the industry' but this is unverified, so 'established' left blank. Hours left empty due to conflicting third-party listings (Birdeye showed Mon 9-5, Tue-Sun 8-6; another search snippet showed Mon-Thu 9-7, Fri 9-5, Sat 9-7, Sun 11-5) - confirm with business before publishing. Rating from Birdeye (4.8/139); Yelp listing shows ~55 reviews differently, so treat count as approximate. Email on site appears as twylaandcompany@gmail.com / TwylaCoStaff@gmail.com (provided contact was venustwyla@gmail.com). Instagram handles: @twyla_and_company_on_5th and @twyla_co. All 6 photo URLs verified HTTP 200 from static.wixstatic.com.
